---
title: "Anna Susanna Yonge"
---

## Anna Susanna Yonge

**Dates:** (1801/2-1894)

**Maiden name:** (Couch)

### Description

aunt by marriage of CMY

### Biography

She married (1868), as his second wife, CMY\'s paternal uncle Dr. [[person:1614]James Yonge]

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
